creator: asami@vader.cs.berkeley.edu
text:
* Hmm... I'm also the author of the patch, and the administrator of
 * ftp.ics.es.osaka-u.ac.jp, so I don't mind about that 'somebody try to
 * get *nonexistent* contents', but I doubt anybody think so too...

What are you trying to say here?

 * Anyway, I'll try. Is there any ports in a such situation (two or more
 * distfiles is needed but all of files is NOT the same directory) ? I
 * want to see for the reference.

There are lots of them under japanese.  For instance, ptex2,
vfghostscript*....

Satoshi
